headline: Why Did UnitedHealth Stock Choose Pain Over Growth?
summary: Long before the stock surged, the company had been openly broadcasting its decision to choose profit over scale. The market initially ignored the signal - until the turnaround became undeniable.

headline: Humana, CenterWell and National Hispanic Medical Association Announce 2026 Resident Physician Scholarship Program Recipients
summary: LOUISVILLE, Ky., June 16, 2026--Humana, CenterWell and National Hispanic Medical Association announce 2026 Resident Physician Scholarship Program recipients.
